CheckTitle: CAPTCHA must be enabled on Lovable auth forms
Description: Lovable apps that expose authentication must require CAPTCHA on signup and login forms to deter automated bot attacks.
Risk: Without CAPTCHA, attackers can automate signup spam, credential stuffing, brute force attacks, and account-takeover attempts at scale.

Code.Other:
1. Open the Lovable dashboard
2. Navigate to project Settings > Authentication
3. Enable CAPTCHA / Bot Protection on signup, login, and password reset forms
4. Test that the CAPTCHA challenge is presented on each form

Recommendation.Text: Enable CAPTCHA on every authentication-facing form so automated tools cannot enumerate users or brute-force credentials.
